description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a prominent rooftop terrace featuring outdoor furniture, umbrellas, and lush landscaping including palm trees and large-leafed plants. The house is surrounded by a solid fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary from the street. The structure has large rectangular windows on both levels, allowing for ample natural light. An exterior staircase leads from the ground level to the rooftop terrace, suggesting easy access to the outdoor living space. The overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor areas. The presence of multiple entry points and a carport or covered area on one side further enhances its urban residential character.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a rooftop terrace, large windows, and lush landscaping, surrounded by a solid privacy fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rooftop terrace with furniture, exterior staircase, and main windows, framed by a privacy fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the palm tree, dense landscaping, and a covered carport or entry area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, rooftop terrace, and large windows, with the privacy fence extending across.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the staircase, additional greenery, and the terrace layout with visible furniture and umbrellas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, exterior steps, and is integrated into the privacy fence with minimal decorative elements.
